question.question: Not only {a1} she win the competition, but she broke the record too.

variants.text: Not only {a1} she win the competition, but she broke the record too.

hints.hint:
After negative/restrictive adverbials (Never, Hardly, Not only, Seldom, Only then…), **subject-auxiliary inversion** is required.
The inverted auxiliary must match the tense of the original clause. Only the auxiliary comes before the subject.

Po przysłówkach o znaczeniu ograniczającym (Never, Hardly, Not only, Seldom…) wymagana jest inwersja podmiotu i operatora.
Inwertowany operator musi odpowiadać czasowi zdania. Tylko operator przechodzi przed podmiot.

«Not only» на початку викликає інверсію: «Not only + did + підмет + базова форма».
«Win» — базова форма після «did»; обидва дієслова в Past Simple вказують на допоміжне «did».

chatgpt_explanations.question: Not only {a1} she win the competition, but she broke the record too.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Correct. «did» is the right form here based on the grammar rule for this sentence type.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Not only {a1} she win the competition, but she broke the record too.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Poprawnie. «did» jest właściwą formą zgodnie z regułą gramatyczną tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Not only {a1} she win the competition, but she broke the record too.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Did» — правильна інверсія Past Simple після «Not only»; базова форма «win» стоїть після підмета.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Not only {a1} she win the competition, but she broke the record too.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Did» — правильна інверсія Past Simple після «Not only»; базова форма «win» стоїть після підмета.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Not only {a1} she win the competition, but she broke the record too.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Incorrect. «had» does not fit the grammatical structure required in this sentence.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Not only {a1} she win the competition, but she broke the record too.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Niepoprawnie. «had» nie pasuje do wymaganej struktury gramatycznej tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Not only {a1} she win the competition, but she broke the record too.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Had» утворювало б Past Perfect; «broke the record» у Past Simple вказує на паралельний Past Simple.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Not only {a1} she win the competition, but she broke the record too.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Had» утворювало б Past Perfect; «broke the record» у Past Simple вказує на паралельний Past Simple.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Not only {a1} she win the competition, but she broke the record too.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Incorrect. «was» does not fit the grammatical structure required in this sentence.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Not only {a1} she win the competition, but she broke the record too.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Niepoprawnie. «was» nie pasuje do wymaganej struktury gramatycznej tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Not only {a1} she win the competition, but she broke the record too.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Was she win» граматично некоректне; «win» вимагає допоміжного «did», а не «was».

chatgpt_explanations.question: Not only {a1} she win the competition, but she broke the record too.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Was she win» граматично некоректне; «win» вимагає допоміжного «did», а не «was».
